activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception activated when certificate contains explicit LC number labeling
General goods description with express invoice reference allowed for verification

consignor.certificate_value: Esswell International AB PO Box 11486 Södra Hamngatan 19-21 SE-40430, GÖTEBORG Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB PO Box 11486, Södra Hamngatan 19-21, SE-404 30 Gothenburg, Sweden. Org.no. 556522-6403 VAT no. SE556522640301
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Esswell International AB' in certificate matches invoice issuer 'ESSWELL INTERNATIONAL AB' including address and country Sweden after allowed normalization of legal entity, abbreviations, and formatting (4.1.0, 4.1.3.6, 4.1.4). VAT and organization number in invoice supports identity. No mismatches detected.

consignee.certificate_value: Burayu Development PLC SUB CITY: CITY,KIRKOS WOREDA:08, H.NO:902 TEL:+251911207028 ADDIS ABABA ETHIOPIA
consignee.invoice_value: BURAYU DEVELOPMENT PLC SUB CITY: CITY,KIRKOS WOREDA:08, H.NO:902 TEL:+251911207028 ADDIS ABABA ETHIOPIA
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Burayu Development PLC' in certificate matches consignee/customer applicant in invoice with same detailed address and country Ethiopia, after normalization (4.2.0.2, 4.2.2.1, 4.2.3). The consignee is identified in the primary customer/applicant field of the invoice according to priority rules.

goods_description.certificate_value: DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK 250GSM 70X100CM, DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK 350 GSM 70X100CM, DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK 400 GSM 70X100CM AS PER PROFORMA INVOICE NO.511202 DATED 22/12/2025
goods_description.invoice_value: 73,71 MT DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK-250 GSM-70X100CM, 63,308 MT DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK-350 GSM-70X100CM AND 22,96 MT DUPLEX BOARD GREY BACK-400 GSM-70X100CM AS PER PROFORMA INVOICE NO.511202 DATED 22/12/2025
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains general goods description with explicit invoice references including invoice number 511202 and date 22/12/2025, matching invoice details exactly (4.3.5). Article descriptions match with acceptable normalization. Article numbers are not specified in certificate to require priority 1 check.

quantity.certificate_value: 73,710 MT net weight, 63,308 MT net weight, 22,960 MT net weight, Total net weight 159,978 MT, Total gross weight 164,9476 MT
quantity.invoice_value: 73,710 MT net weight, 63,308 MT net weight, 22,960 MT net weight, Total Quantity 159,978 MT, 164,9476 MT gross weight
quantity.motivation: Quantities and weights in certificate match numeric values in invoice within allowed decimal truncation and unit alignment. No contradictory weight or quantity values found. Both net and gross weights correspond exactly (4.4.3.3, 4.4.6). Units MT and metric tons used consistently.

origin.motivation: The certificate states 'Country of origin' as India (box 3). However, the Certificate also includes 'EUROPEAN UNION' as primary origin label. The invoice origin field confirms 'India.' The presence of 'European Union' on the Certificate and India in origin causes contradiction: LC exception limits verification only to origin in invoice and multiple conflicting origins exist. Per LC exception rules only origin verification applies but the certificate origin field shows EU and India, which is inconsistent and not verifiable against invoice as required (2.2, 4.5.4.1). Result is MISMATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor, consignee, goods description, and quantity match between documents. However, origin verification fails due to conflicting origins listed in certificate (India and European Union) and invoice stating India only. Per Letter of Credit exception, only origin is verified, causing mismatch. Manual handling required.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger ursprungslandet som 'India' men samtidigt 'European Union' vilket är inkonsekvent. Fakturan anger 'India' som ursprung. Ursprungskontrollen kan därför inte verifieras och kräver manuell granskning.
